characters.name: Aika
characters.description: AikaKanjiアイカRomanjiAikaCharacteristicsGenderFemaleRaceHuman (Vegan)BackgroundStatusAliveAffiliationNeo-DEAVAOccupationElement User/PilotAikais a minor character. She is a femaleElement UseratNeo-DEAVA. Aika is a young blond girl with twin pigtail hairstyle. She has bluish-purple eyes and wears non-sleeve shirt. Aika like most girls is excited when they had to start teaming up with boys.

characters.name: Akira Kaibuki
characters.description: Akira KaibukiKanji灰吹 陽RomanjiKaibuki AkiraCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceHumanBackgroundRelativesKounosuke Kaibuki (stepfather)Shizuka Kaibuki (stepmother)AffiliationDEAVAOccupationHigh School StudentTeamVerbalism ClubPartnerMaia TsukiganeMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceNobunaga ShimazakiEnglish VoiceTodd HaberkornAkira Kaibuki(灰吹 陽,Kaibuki Akira)is the main protagonist ofAquarion LOGOSseries. He considers himself to be "The Savior" of mankind. As if to accompany his claim, he holds a tremendous amount of Creative Voice Power and is truly able to command powerful moments. He was the pilot of Vector 1, and currently pilots the Vector-Ga.

characters.name: Alicia Sora
characters.description: Alicia SoraKanjiアリシア・ソラRomanjiSora AliciaCharacteristicsGenderFemaleRaceElement/Human (Vegan)Height170 cm (5'5 ft)EyesPurpleHairPinkBackgroundStatusDeceasedRelativesIzumo Kamurogi(Lover)Amata Sora(Son)Kagura Demuri(Son)AffiliationAltairOccupationActress/SingerPartnerIzumo KamurogiMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceRie TanakaEnglish VoiceStephanie YoungAlicia Sorais an actress and a singer from Vega, the lover ofIzumo Kamurogi, and the mother of bothAmata SoraandKagura Demuri. She was abducted 10 years prior to the series' events. She has long pink hair and purple eyes. She has only been shown wearing a beautiful red and white dress with black tights, due to the fact she was abducted while wearing said dress, and put to sleep for a long time afterwards. Curiously, the dress she wears when she was abducted is the costume she uses in the movie Skies of Aquaria, where she plays Sylvie, the character inspired bySilvia de Alisia. In the flashbacks and in Amata's photos of her, she's shown to wear a variety of other attires.

characters.name: Amata Sora
characters.description: Amata SoraKanjiアマタ・ソラRomanjiAmata SoraAliasSolar WingsCharacteristicsAge16-17GenderMaleRaceHuman (Element User)Height170 cm (5'7 ft)EyesVioletHairOrangeBackgroundStatusAliveRelativesPollon(Past Life)Apollo(Past Life)Alicia Sora(Mother)Izumo Kamurogi(Father)Kagura Demuri("Dark" Half of soul)Mikono Suzushiro(Lover)AffiliationNeo-DEAVAOccupationAquarion Pilot/StudentPartnerMikono SuzushiroMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceYūki KajiEnglish VoiceChristopher Bevins Amata Sora(アマタ・ソラ,Amata Sora)is the main protagonist ofAquarion EVOL. He is the son ofAliciaandIzumoand is also the reincarnation ofApolloandPollon. Amata has short, orange hair and violet eyes. He wears a black shirt under a sleeveless red vest. He wears a pair of gray cargos with a thick brown belt along with a pair of small bags used to carry weights. He wears a pair of boots which he fills with various amounts of weight depending on how excited he is, to prevent himself from flying off due to his ability. The soles of his shoes can be opened up to remove the weights in case he needs to fly rather than stay grounded.

characters.name: Andy W. Hole
characters.description: Andy W. HoleKanjiアンディ・W・ホールRomanjiAndi Daburu HōruCharacteristicsAge17GenderMaleRaceElement/HumanHeight175 cmEyesLight BrownHairBrownBackgroundAffiliationNeo-DEAVAOccupationAquarion PilotMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceKousuke ToriumiEnglish VoiceJosh GrelleWielding the element power of creating holes, Andy could find a weak point on any structure in order to collapse it into a hole. But he used this ability early on only to get close to the girls, physically. One student has said, "He is similar toPierre Vieirawith his obsession of girls." Andy has brown hair and light brown eyes. He's always seen wearing a woollen cap, along with fingerless gloves. He comes off as very friendly, as he instantly bonded with Amata the moment after he met him, immediately calling him his "digging bro". His passion for digging holes strangely gave him a philosophical persona, comparing holes to other people's emotional problems and that he felt the need to create holes so that it can replace other people's emotional problems. He once said that the only hole he'll fall into, is one he dug himself. He doesn't have any emotional problems. His initial passion to create holes, contrasted with his generally optimistic personality, however, it caused a terrible misunderstanding when he tried to confess his love for MIX, and thus caused him to fall into a depression (the hole he dug himself). His obsession with girls made him come across as perverse, this heightened sexual tension was caused by a gender-barrier wall called the Berlin, which caused his infatuation to become an obsession, taking any chance he got to be physically close to a girl. He abandons this once he truly falls for MIX.

characters.name: Aye Chang
characters.description: Aye ChangKanjiエイ・チャンRomanjiAi ChanCharacteristicsGenderFemaleRaceHuman (Vegan)BackgroundStatusAliveAffiliationNeo-DEAVAOccupationElement User/PilotAye Changis a minor character. She is a femaleElement UseratNeo-DEAVA, she is often teamed withMalloy Direzza. Aye Chang is a young girl with very long brown hair usually tied in two. She has purple eyes and wears a pink ribbon. She usually wears a sea-green/blue dress. Aye Chang like most girls is excited when they had to start teaming up with boys and was really happy when they had to go toNeo-Kowloonas she considered it to be like a normal date.

characters.name: Baron
characters.description: BaronKanjiバロンRomanjiBaronCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceHumanEyesGray-blueHairDark BrownBackgroundRelativesApollo(foster brother)Media PortrayalJapanese VoiceSusumu ChibaEnglish VoiceZach BoltonApollo'sbest friend, Baron charges Apollo with the task of taking care of the other orphans. Baron has dark brown hair that he keeps wrapped up in a blue cloth, green eyes, and freckles. He wears a light blue scarf, a green coat, black pants with blue leg warmers on top, and brown shoes. He keeps his arms wrapped up in bandages. Not much is known about Baron's personality, but it can be assumed that he was very kind and caring. In the middle of the winter when he and Apollo were starving, he shared his food with him. He seems to be the one who brought the group of orphans together, and since they don't have money, they resort to stealing. However, if any danger were to come, he'd clear a way for them to escape first, as seen inMemories of Heavenly Wings.

characters.name: Cayenne Suzushiro
characters.description: Cayenne SuzushiroKanjiカイエン・スズシロRomanjiKaien SuzushiroCharacteristicsAge19GenderMaleRaceHumanHeight181cmEyesBrownHairNavyBackgroundRelativesMikono Suzushiro(Sister)AffiliationNeo-DEAVAOccupationAquarion PilotMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceKenichi SuzumuraEnglish VoiceJason Liebrecht Elder brother of Mikono Suzushiro. He is popular and well-known among the girls of the academy. His Element power is called Prophecy of Despair which allows him to foretell when disaster is about to befall those near him, and makes use of it to perfect his sniping skills. He tries his best to protect his little sister as he had vision of her dying with her death having some connection with Aquarion. He is a bit annoyed with Amata Sora since Amata is the one that brings Mikono Suzushiro closer to the Aquarion. Cayenne is tall, slightly built and has short navy hair, brown eyes and tanned skin. He wears a khaki combat vest and cargo pants with a navy coat, which he wears like a cape. He also wears black fingerless gloves and combat boots.

characters.name: Chloe Klick
characters.description: Chloe KlickKanjiクロエ・クーリックRomanjiKuroe KūrikkuCharacteristicsAge14GenderFemaleRaceHumanEyesPurpleHairPurpleBackgroundRelativesKurt(Brother)AffiliationDEAVAOccupationElementPartnerPierreKurtMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceRomi ParkEnglish VoiceCaitlin GlassFraternal twinsister toKurt. She can communicate with him through telepathy and, like her brother, very rarely partakes in combat. Instead she, like her brother, controls and monitors the computers inDEAVA's control room. Kurt Chloe wears a white, collared long sleeved top and a blue tie. She wears a skirt that goes to her mid thighs with a black belt. She wears blue socks that go up her calves and gray shoes. When piloting a Vector, she wears a purple bodysuit with gray wrist guards.

characters.name: Crea Dolosera
characters.description: Crea DoloseraKanjiクレア・ドロセラRomanjiKurea DoroseraCharacteristicsGenderFemaleRaceHumanEyesVioletHairWhiteBackgroundStatusAliveRelativesRena Rune(past life)AffiliationNeo-DEAVAOccupationNeo-DEAVA ChairwomanMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceSakura TangeEnglish VoiceCarrie SavageCrea Doloserais the one responsible for recruitingShrade Elan. She is responsible for giving the signal of approval for the unification of the Vectors. Prior to the beginning of the story and after the prohibition of using Aquarion she is said to be on a trip, returning after the Aquarion's debut, once the seal is broken and the wall separating the girls and boys section is destroyed. She has the appearance of a small white-haired girl who despite that, seems to be very smart judging by her IQ.

characters.name: Donar Dantes
characters.description: Donar DantesKanjiドナール・ダンテスRomanjiDonāru DantesuCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceElement/HumanEyesgreen-yellowHairBrownBackgroundStatusAliveAffiliationNeo-DEAVAPartnerNanaonMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceJunichi SuwabeEnglish VoiceJustin Cook A veteran soldier and chief ofNeo-DEAVA'smale academy. He uses a pair of prosthetic arms to replace those he lost on a disastrous incident when he piloted Aquarion on its first sortie against theAbductors8 years before, during which Aquarion become uncontrollable. The incident also resulted in the disappearance of the other two pilots, one of which was his girlfriend. He is a sharpshooter and is capable of using a small blowgun at a distance with ease and precision as shown when he is watching overAmatafrom afar during the test at Neo-Kowloon. He and Suomi feel like there is something important that could happen sinceCreaandZensuddenly returned to the Academy. Donar has dark-brown hair that is kept mostly combed back, but with bangs on the right of his face loose and protruding from under his beret, and green-yellow eyes. In the incident 8 years previously Donar lost his arms, and they have since been replaced with mechanical prosthetics. The arms can serve for multiple purposes, as seen when parts such as his hands are shown to be replaced with things such as a hook, fork, or tazer, and can even be equipped with weapons as seen in Ep. 12. Interestingly enough, his mouth has also become mechanical, even though it was not affected when his arms were lost.

characters.name: Futaba
characters.description: FutabaKanji小天翅・双翅RomanjiKotenshi FutabaAliasChild AngelCharacteristicsAge12,000+ yearsGenderMaleRaceShadow AngelEyesGreenHairGreenBackgroundAffiliationShadow AngelsMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceTomoko KawakamiEnglish VoiceLuci Christian The only child angel who survivedAtlandia'sdestruction 12,000 years before. Futaba wears a skin colored top that's tucked under a pair of green, yellow, and brown shorts, that go past his knees. He wears black bandages on his calves and black open-toed and open-heeled sandals. He wears some sort of metal gloves on each of his hands, as well as on his shoulders and where his wings are. Futaba has green hair with yellow-to-red strands in it, as well as a blue-coloured jewelled headband. His eyes match the color of his hair.

characters.name: Gen Fudou
characters.description: Gen FudoKanji不動・GENRomanjiFudō GenAliasThe Great MagicianCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceElement/HumanEyesBrownHairBrownBackgroundRelativesApollonius(Past Life)Zen Fudo(Reincarnation)AffiliationDEAVAOccupationCommanderMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceUnshou IshizukaEnglish VoiceBrandon Potter Zen Fudo(Reincarnation) The Founder and true leader ofDEAVAand the one responsible for unearthing the Vector Machines, only to disappear shortly afterwards. When the Elements' battle against the Shadow Angels began, he returns to assume his position as DEAVA's supreme commander.

characters.name: Gen Fudou
characters.description: Gen FudoKanji不動・GENRomanjiFudō GenAliasThe Great MagicianCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceElement/HumanEyesBrownHairBrownBackgroundRelativesApollonius(Past Life)Zen Fudo(Reincarnation)AffiliationDEAVAOccupationCommanderMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceUnshou IshizukaEnglish VoiceBrandon Potter Zen Fudo(Reincarnation) The Founder and true leader ofDEAVAand the one responsible for unearthing the Vector Machines, only to disappear shortly afterwards. When the Elements' battle against the Shadow Angels began, he returns to assume his position as DEAVA's supreme commander.

characters.name: Glen Anderson
characters.description: Glen AndersonKanjiグレン・アンダーソンRomanjiGuren AndāsonCharacteristicsAge17GenderMaleRaceHumanEyesGrayHairSilverBackgroundAffiliationDEAVAOccupationElement/PilotMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceYuto KazamaEnglish VoiceMike McFarlandA close friend ofSiriusandReika, the three were the first Element Users to perform a successful Unification, but this partnership ends abruptly when an accident puts Glen in acoma. Sirius and Reika regularly visited him in theDEAVAmedical bay, until he mysteriously disappeared. After mysteriously disappearing from DEAVA's medical bay, it is discovered that he is being used to pilot theNew United NationsMilitary Vectors (individually alongside one ofFutaba's feathers to operate the Vectors) against theShadow Angelswhen Aquarion was out-of-action due to Sirius' recent defection along withVector Mars. It is revealed that his disappearance is caused by a voluntary operation to graft Shadow Angel feathers (taken from a captured and mutilated Futaba) to his person to combat the Shadow Angels themselves. This is seen in bad taste by both Humans and Shadow Angels. It is shown in flashbacks that the feathers used on Glen caused severe reactions at first, forcing Glen to undergo extreme measures to contain his psychological reaction (in turn removing more of his personality making him more of a military machine). In the battle against Sirius inCherubim Mars, Glen's enhancements allowed him to quickly switch between AquarionAlpha,DeltaandOmega, as well as pilot all three forms with a relenting assault on Sirius. However, due to the emotionsSilviatransferred into Vector Omega, it was forced to separate. Glen was initially ordered to prevent Silvia from reuniting with her brother (out of fear of her betrayal) before she merged with Reika andApolloto form Aquarion Angel. After the battle against Sirius, the pilots and vectors were returned to their respective bases (though DEVA kept Omega to replace the missing Mars).

characters.name: Glen Anderson
characters.description: Glen AndersonKanjiグレン・アンダーソンRomanjiGuren AndāsonCharacteristicsAge17GenderMaleRaceHumanEyesGrayHairSilverBackgroundAffiliationDEAVAOccupationElement/PilotMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceYuto KazamaEnglish VoiceMike McFarlandA close friend ofSiriusandReika, the three were the first Element Users to perform a successful Unification, but this partnership ends abruptly when an accident puts Glen in acoma. Sirius and Reika regularly visited him in theDEAVAmedical bay, until he mysteriously disappeared. After mysteriously disappearing from DEAVA's medical bay, it is discovered that he is being used to pilot theNew United NationsMilitary Vectors (individually alongside one ofFutaba's feathers to operate the Vectors) against theShadow Angelswhen Aquarion was out-of-action due to Sirius' recent defection along withVector Mars. It is revealed that his disappearance is caused by a voluntary operation to graft Shadow Angel feathers (taken from a captured and mutilated Futaba) to his person to combat the Shadow Angels themselves. This is seen in bad taste by both Humans and Shadow Angels. It is shown in flashbacks that the feathers used on Glen caused severe reactions at first, forcing Glen to undergo extreme measures to contain his psychological reaction (in turn removing more of his personality making him more of a military machine). In the battle against Sirius inCherubim Mars, Glen's enhancements allowed him to quickly switch between AquarionAlpha,DeltaandOmega, as well as pilot all three forms with a relenting assault on Sirius. However, due to the emotionsSilviatransferred into Vector Omega, it was forced to separate. Glen was initially ordered to prevent Silvia from reuniting with her brother (out of fear of her betrayal) before she merged with Reika andApolloto form Aquarion Angel. After the battle against Sirius, the pilots and vectors were returned to their respective bases (though DEVA kept Omega to replace the missing Mars).

characters.name: Golshi
characters.description: GolshiKanji怪力翅・剛翅RomanjiKairiki Hane GoushiAliasPreternatural Strength AngelCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceShadow AngelBackgroundStatusDeceasedAffiliationShadow AngelsHe has the appearance of a monstrous giant, who never speaks, but is expressed only through animalistic growls and verses. Has wings on his head as if it were a ridge.

characters.name: Hayato Kujou
characters.description: Pleaseexpand the articleas well as you can! Pleaseexpand the articleas well as you can! Hayato KujouKanji空篠翼人RomanjiKujō HayatoCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceHumanMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceUmehara YuuichirouHayato Kujou(空篠翼人,Kujō Hayato)is one of the Aquarion pilots ofAquarion LOGOS. A university student who exemplifies maturity among the team. Aspiring to be a lawyer who uses the strength of words to drive his verdicts, Hayato detests Akira's personality of "I'm a savior". But at the same time, he respects the existence of such an unreasonable person.

characters.name: Izumo Kamurogi
characters.description: Izumo KamurogiKanjiイズモ・カムロギRomanjiIzumo KamurogiCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceHumanHeight181 cm (5'9 ft)EyesBlueHairGrey (formerly Brown)BackgroundStatusDeceasedRelativesAlicia Sora(Lover)Amata Sora(Son)Kagura Demuri(Son)AffiliationAltairOccupationCommanderPartnerAlicia SoraMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceHiroki YasumotoEnglish VoiceMike McFarlandIzumo Kamurogi(イズモ・カムロギ,Izumo Kamurogi)is the commander of the Altair forces. He is a middle-aged man with medium-long grey hair, and a goatee. He has sharp blue eyes, and they glow when he activates his powers, as seen when he countered Mikage's psychic powers. In a flashback, is shown that in his youth he had slightly shorter, brown hair.

characters.name: Jean-Jerome Jorge
characters.description: Jean-Jerome JorgeKanjiジャン・ジェローム・ジョルジュRomanjiJan Jerōmu JorujuCharacteristicsAge24GenderMaleRaceHumanEyesBrownHairBlue-GrayBackgroundAffiliationDEAVAOccupationDeputy CommanderMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceNobuo TobitaEnglish VoiceJason LiebrechtDEAVA's second-in-command, Jean-Jerome is arrogant, pessimistic, quick to judge and somewhat pretentious - the opposite of CommanderFudou. Jerome wears a white and blue striped collared coat with blue pants and white shoes. He has blue-gray colored hair, brown eyes, and wears orange-tinted glasses. Jerome tends to not agree with or understand his actions and more than willing to see theShadow Angelsdestroyed and humanity prospering in their defeat. At the end of the series, when Commander Fudou was missing, he heroically planned the operation toAtlandia, deciding to disobey to his order and helpApolloand his friends to saveSilviain Episode 23,Fleeting Wings.

characters.name: Jin Muso
characters.description: Jin MusoKanjiジン・ムソウRomanjiJin MusōCharacteristicsGenderMaleRaceHuman (Element User)EyesGreyHairBlondBackgroundStatusDeceasedLineageShin Tsukishima(Past Life)AffiliationNeo-DEAVAAltairOccupationAquarion PilotGnis PilotPartnerYunoha ThrulKagura DemuriMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceJun FukushimaEnglish VoiceTodd HaberkornJin Muso(ジン・ムソウ,Jin Musō)is the only Element user originally from Altair. He was Izumo's second in command who prefered in employing furtive tactics against his opponents. He managed to infiltrate the Neo-DEAVA academy as a transfer student under the name Akbarjin Batbayar, but coincidentally, the other students nicknamed him Jin. There he became attached and fell in love withYunoha Thruland awakened his element power while trying to protect her from an energy blast. Jin Muso is a young man with medium long green hair and grey eyes. He is calm and a good analyst, his quick thinking allows him to execute his attacks and strategies perfectly. He is also a sharpshooter.

characters.name: Johannes
characters.description: JohannesKanji老賢翅・夜翅RomanjiRōkenshi YohanesuAliasElder AngelCharacteristicsAge12,000+ yearsGenderMaleRaceShadow AngelBackgroundAffiliationShadow AngelsOccupationSupreme CommanderMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceShin AomoriEnglish VoiceVic Mignogna Johannes is the eldest and the leader of theShadow Angels. Johannes' face is never revealed in the series. His body is draped in dark purple robes and chains and wears what appears to be a helmet-like mask of metal with a cross-shaped visor on its face. Johannes appears to be missing the bottom half of his body for some unknown reason but he is constantly suspended from the ceiling in the main altar ofAtlandiaby the chains covering his body. The interior of his robes appear to have a red lining on the inside and seems that beneath his robes there are even more chains. However, these chains seem to be fashioned in a manner similar to that of chain-mail armor which further adds to the "knight" like appearance Johannes portrays. Unlike the other members of his species, Johannes does not actually seem to have traditional angel-like wings, instead his wings resemble that of bat and for some reason are also draped in his robes.

characters.name: Jun Lee
characters.description: Jun LeeKanjiジュン・リーRomanjiJun RīCharacteristicsAge14GenderMaleRaceHumanEyesGrayHairGreenBackgroundAffiliationDEAVAOccupationElement User/PilotPartnerTsugumiMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceDaisuke SakaguchiEnglish VoiceTodd HaberkornJun Lee is the residentotakuof the Aquarion pilots. He excels in handling computers and machines and although he rarely enters into battle, Jun spends most of the time operating the computers inDEAVA's control room. Jun wears a long-sleeved with a blue tie with a yellow-green vest on top. He wears green pants with a belt and blue sneakers. On his face are a pair of glasses, and on his left hand, he has a silver watch-like computer. He andReikagaveTsugumithe support that she needed to break the barrier in the episodeHeaven's Gate. In the episode calledElement School,he hacked into DEAVA's system and learned about the events from 12,000 years ago. He may look like just a nerd, but he's a very adaptive smart person among some of his other fellow classmates. He even tries to asses situations using his watch-like gadget.

characters.description: Kagura DemuriKanjiカグラ・デムリRomanjiKagura DemuriAliasBeast of DarknessBeast of LoveFragmented OneDark AmataCharacteristicsAge16-17GenderMaleRaceElement User/Human (Altairan/Vegan)Height178 cm (5'10 ft)EyesGoldHairRedBackgroundStatusAliveRelativesPollon(past life)Apollo(past life)Amata Sora(Brother)Alicia Sora(Mother)Izumo Kamurogi(Father)Mikage Towano(Mentor)AffiliationNeo-DEAVAOccupationElement User/Aquarion PilotPartnerZessica WongMedia PortrayalJapanese VoiceKōki UchiyamaEnglish VoiceTaliesin Jaffe Amata Sora(Brother)Alicia Sora(Mother)Izumo Kamurogi(Father)Mikage Towano(Mentor) Kagura Demuri(カグラ・デムリ,Kagura Demuri)is one of the main protagonists ofAquarion EVOL.
